frigate_setup.title: Frigate Connection
frigate_setup.description:
Configure your Frigate NVR connection.

Existing Frigate URL: {frigate_url}

mqtt.title: MQTT Configuration
mqtt.description: Configure the MQTT broker connection for Frigate events.

push_provider.title: Push Notification Provider
push_provider.description:
Choose how to deliver push notifications to mobile devices.

**Frigate Mobile Relay** is the easiest option — it works out of the box with the Frigate Mobile app and requires no additional accounts.

relay.title: Frigate Mobile Relay
relay.description:
The push relay securely forwards notifications from your bridge to the Frigate Mobile app.

A unique bridge ID, secret, and end-to-end encryption key have been generated for you — you do not need to change these unless you know what you are doing.

ntfy.title: ntfy Setup
ntfy.description: Configure ntfy for push notifications. You can use the public ntfy.sh server or your own self-hosted instance.

pushover.title: Pushover Setup
pushover.description: Enter your Pushover credentials. You can find these in your Pushover dashboard at pushover.net.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Frigate server

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one instance of Frigate Notify Bridge is allowed

connection_settings.title: Connection Settings
connection_settings.description: Configure the Frigate URL and home WiFi networks for local/remote switching.

device_notification_settings_select.title: Choose Device
device_notification_settings_select.description: Select a paired Frigate Mobile device to edit its notification rules.

device_notification_settings.title: Device Notification Rules
device_notification_settings.description: Configure per-device notification filters and media preferences for {device_name}. Comma-separated camera, label, and zone fields can be left empty to allow all values.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.description: Control troubleshooting features for the Frigate Notify Bridge integration. Enable debug logging only while diagnosing issues, because it will create more Home Assistant log output.

device_management.title: Manage Paired Devices
device_management.description: You have {device_count} paired device(s). Select devices to remove.

add_device.title: Add Device
add_device.description:
Scan the QR code below with the Frigate Mobile app to pair a new device.

Code: **{code}** (expires in {expires_in} minutes)

![Pairing QR Code]({qr_image})

> **Tip:** If the code has expired, go back and select **Add Device** again — a fresh QR code is generated each time.

push_provider_unavailable.title: Push provider unavailable

notification_delivery_failures.title: Notification delivery failures detected
